system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_order_detail_auto_create","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_ORDER_DETAIL_AUTO_CREATE
	@idOrderNumber INT,
	@orderCode NVARCHAR(200),
	@customerCode nvarchar(50),
	@productCode NVARCHAR(50),
	@custProductCode NVARCHAR(50),
	@productName NVARCHAR(200),
	@loaisp NVARCHAR(50),
	@range NVARCHAR(200),
	@colorCode NVARCHAR(50),
	@colorName NVARCHAR(200),
	@quantity INT,
	@price DECIMAL(18, 2),
	@amount DECIMAL(18, 2),
	@remark NVARCHAR(200),
	@bemat_sanpham nvarchar(50),
	@ketcau_sanpham nvarchar(50),
	@nguoitao NVARCHAR(200),
	@ngaytao DATETIME
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @idOrderNumber INT
	--DECLARE @orderCode NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @customerCode nvarchar(50)
	--DECLARE @productCode NVARCHAR(50)
	--DECLARE @custProductCode NVARCHAR(50)
	--DECLARE @productName NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @loaisp NVARCHAR(50)
	--DECLARE @range NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @colorCode NVARCHAR(50)
	--DECLARE @colorName NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @quantity INT
	--DECLARE @price DECIMAL(18, 2)
	--DECLARE @amount DECIMAL(18, 2)
	--DECLARE @remark NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @bemat_sanpham nvarchar(50)
	--DECLARE @ketcau_sanpham nvarchar(50)
	--DECLARE @nguoitao NVARCHAR(200)
	--DECLARE @ngaytao DATETIME


	-- CẬP NHẬT SẢN PHẨM NHÀ MÁY
	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_sanpham_nhamay WHERE masp_nhamay = @productCode)
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_sanpham_nhamay (masp_nhamay, tensp, hehang, active, nguoitao, ngaytao, nguoisua, ngaysua)
		VALUES (@productCode, @productName, @range, 1, @nguoitao, @ngaytao, @nguoitao, @ngaytao)
	END

	--CẬP NHẬT MÃ MÀU SẮC
	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_color WHERE code = @colorCode)
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_color (code, [name], active)
		VALUES (@colorCode, @colorName, 1)
	END

	-- CẬP NHẬT MÃ SẢN PHẨM
	DECLARE @masp NVARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @mahtr nvarchar(200)
	DECLARE @bemat_sanpham2 nvarchar(50)
	SET @masp = @productCode + '_' + @colorCode + '_' + @customerCode;
	SET @mahtr = 'W' + @productCode + '_' + @bemat_sanpham;
	SELECT @bemat_sanpham2 = ma FROM tr_common WHERE phanloai = 1 AND ma = @bemat_sanpham;

	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_sanpham WHERE masp = @masp)
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_sanpham (masp, masp_khachhang, masp_nhamay, tensp, hehang, mausac, customer, loaisp, bemat_sanpham, ketcau, dvt, create_by, create_date)
		VALUES (@masp, @custProductCode, @productCode, @productName, @range, @colorCode, @customerCode, @loaisp, @bemat_sanpham2, @ketcau_sanpham, N'Cái', @nguoitao, @ngaytao)
	END

	-- CẬP NHẬT MÃ HÀNG TRẮNG

	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_material WHERE mavt = @mahtr)
	BEGIN
		--SELECT masp, mact, tenct, dvt, attribute1, attribute3 FROM tr_chitiet_hangtrang
		INSERT INTO tr_chitiet_hangtrang (masp, mact, tenct, dvt, attribute1, attribute3)
		VALUES (@masp, @mahtr, @productName, N'Cái', @productCode, @bemat_sanpham)

		INSERT INTO tr_material (idxuong, mavt, tenvt, mota, dvt, nhom, kho, xoa, xacnhan)
		VALUES (@mahtr, @mahtr, @productName, @productName, N'Cái', N'Hàng trắng', N'HÀNG TRẮNG', 'N', 1)
	END

	IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_order_detail WHERE order_number = @orderCode AND item_number = @masp)
	BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_order_detail
		SET order_qty = order_qty + @quantity,
			amount = amount + (@quantity * price)
		WHERE order_number = @orderCode AND item_number = @masp
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_order_detail
		(
			customer, [range], order_number, item_number, cust_item_number, [description], color,
			order_qty, price, currency, amount, remark, f_cancelled, idOrderNumber,
			create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date
		) VALUES (
			@customerCode, @range, @orderCode, @masp, @productCode, @productName, @colorCode,
			@quantity, @price, 'USD', @amount, @remark, 'N', @idOrderNumber,
			@nguoitao, @ngaytao, @nguoitao, @ngaytao
		)
	END

END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_color","dbo.tr_common","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_color","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay"],"flags":["writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
